exam_price_notes: $199 exam fee; requires active CPhT credential.

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Pearson VUE test centers nationwide

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name must exactly match registration. Secondary ID may be requested.
exam_rules: Closed-book. On-screen calculator provided. No personal items permitted in testing room. PTCE includes 80 scored items and 10 unscored pretest items (not identified). Score scale: 1000–1600; passing is 1400.
renewal_options: 2-year certification cycle. Renewal requires 20 pharmacy-related CE hours per 2-year cycle, including 1 hour in pharmacy law and 1 hour in patient safety. Online renewal application submitted through PTCB portal.

prerequisites.description: Active CPhT (PTCE) certification required; minimum 3 years of pharmacy technician work experience

retake_policy.notes: Candidates must wait 90 days before retaking any PTCB exam. PTCE has a lifetime maximum of 5 attempts. Full exam fee required for each attempt.

official_study_resources.title: PTCE Content Outline
official_study_resources.notes: Free downloadable content outline with knowledge domain breakdown; linked from the credential page

official_study_resources.title: PTCB Practice Exam
official_study_resources.notes: Official practice exam available through PTCB
